seed_instruction: Draft an email to a bank asking for clarification about a recent transaction.
org_constraint: The phrase "transaction details" must appear exactly twice.
new_constraint: Each paragraph must include the phrase "transaction details."
instruction: Draft an email to a bank asking for clarification about a recent transaction. The phrase "transaction details" must appear exactly twice. Each paragraph must include the phrase "transaction details."
response:
Subject: Inquiry Regarding Recent Transaction - Account [Your Account Number]

Dear [Bank Name] Customer Service,

I am writing to request clarification regarding a recent charge on my account, [Your Account Number]. I noticed a transaction on [Date of Transaction] for the amount of [Amount of Transaction], and I would appreciate it if you could provide more comprehensive **transaction details** for this specific entry. I am trying to reconcile my recent spending and need to understand the nature of this charge.

Could you please investigate this matter and send me the full **transaction details** at your earliest convenience? Specifically, I am looking for more information regarding the merchant or the purpose of this debit. Any additional context you can provide regarding these **transaction details** would be extremely helpful in resolving this query.

Thank you for your time and assistance with this matter. I look forward to your prompt response and clarification regarding these **transaction details**.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Phone Number]
[Your Email Address]<turn|>
